title: Error Handling
kpi: Reduce confusion around failed extraction runs
state: Currently, capturing the failed states of the tabular review tool.

log.content: Make a branch from main and Engineering (Arham and Michael) will implement the branch.

summary: This work introduces a structured, multi-level error handling model for tabular extractions that clearly communicates failure scope (run, document, or cell) and enables faster, more confident decision-making. By reducing redundant error noise and surfacing actionable states in context, it minimizes silent failures, streamlines recovery workflows, and increases trust in extracted data quality.
kpis: Reduce confusion around failed extraction runs
